Video.summary: Josephine's family was ripped apart after her boyfriend Mark was accused of molestation. Her son, Anthony and his girlfriend, Renee believe Mark molested their 2 year old son. But Mark believes that Renee coached her son to say this!
Video.title: I Believe My Son!

Image.alt: I Believe My Son!
I Believe My Son!
I Believe My Son!

Video.summary: Ashley’s first love, Chris, betrayed her for her sister and now faces abuse allegations.
Video.title: He Left Me For My Sister

Image.alt: He Left Me For My Sister
He Left Me For My Sister
He Left Me For My Sister

Video.summary: James learned that his new wife may have been cheating with his cousin; Marissa left her doubting boyfriend two days after her baby was born, and now he wants the truth; Lyric wants to prove to Jeff's family that her baby is his.
Video.title: Steve, I Hope I'm the Father

Image.alt: Steve, I Hope I'm the Father
Steve, I Hope I'm the Father
Steve, I Hope I'm the Father

Video.summary: Javon says her sister Shermonica’s man Chris is cheating, but Chris claims Javon is lying out of jealousy!
Video.title: I Don't Want Your Sister But She Wants Me

Image.alt: I Don't Want Your Sister But She Wants Me
I Don't Want Your Sister But She Wants Me
I Don't Want Your Sister But She Wants Me

Video.summary: Nykki, Jayda, Tammy and Pamela are here because Larry has fathered children with them. They say Larry not only an abusive deadbeat, but also engages in drugs, alcohol and pimps some of them out. Don’t miss the drama today!
Video.title: Steve is Speechless

Image.alt: Steve is Speechless
Steve is Speechless
Steve is Speechless

Video.summary: Joyia is desperate to keep her friend Stephanie from going back to her abusive boyfriend Scott. If Stephanie takes him back, Scott will continue to abuse her. But she still loves him! Will she have the strength to leave him?
Video.title: How Can You Still Love Him?

Image.alt: How Can You Still Love Him?
How Can You Still Love Him?
How Can You Still Love Him?

Video.summary: There is nothing more serious than allegations of child abuse, but when all the testimonies are laid out, the stories just don't add up. Steve has the lie detector results and will reveal the truth once and for all.
Video.title: I Don't Believe Your Story

Image.alt: I Don't Believe Your Story
I Don't Believe Your Story
I Don't Believe Your Story

Video.summary: In order to avoid charges, Christi abandons her ten year old daughter and leaves the state. Her daughter wants to give her one last chance to take responsibility and be in her life.
Video.title: Mommy, Go To Jail For Me

Image.alt: Mommy, Go To Jail For Me
Mommy, Go To Jail For Me
Mommy, Go To Jail For Me

Video.summary: After breaking up, Janell gave birth to their second child, but does not allow Rolando to be alone with the child because she believes that he abused their first baby. Then, Kayla is 14 years old and pregnant with Garret's child.
Video.title: Too Young to Be Parents

Image.alt: Too Young to Be Parents
Too Young to Be Parents
Too Young to Be Parents

Video.summary: Jared says that he is positive that his wife Sarah is cheating on him and he admits to physically abusing Sarah because he says he hates being lied to. Sarah, who is pregnant, says that she's desperate to stop Jared's abusing ways.
Video.title: My Kids Watch Him Hit Me

Image.alt: My Kids Watch Him Hit Me
My Kids Watch Him Hit Me
My Kids Watch Him Hit Me

Video.summary: Tamara's man quit his job, but, inexplicably, still has money coming in, and she thinks she knows why; Rainy says she caught her boyfriend responding to ads for sex with men and transsexuals.
Video.title: Prove You're Not Having Sex for Money

Image.alt: Prove You're Not Having Sex for Money
Prove You're Not Having Sex for Money
Prove You're Not Having Sex for Money

Video.summary: Because of messages Dashana found on social media and her new boyfriend's phone, she suspects he is cheating; Richard says his girlfriend's family found her in bed with another man and forced her to tell him; Sean sets up cameras to spy on his wife.
Video.title: Shocking Cheating Confessions

Image.alt: Shocking Cheating Confessions
Shocking Cheating Confessions
Shocking Cheating Confessions

Video.summary: Geeky Ben finally got with his dream girl and now wants to leave his girlfriend Brittany. Katie ended up sleeping with best friend Julie’s man on a camping trip, but he’s got his own secret. Tina took over her friend Leanne’s house and husband!
Video.title: I'm Leaving You For My Dream Girl

Image.alt: I'm Leaving You For My Dream Girl
I'm Leaving You For My Dream Girl
I'm Leaving You For My Dream Girl

Video.summary: When John was sent away to prison, he asked brother Derrick to help take care of his family, but he never imagined Derrick would hook up with his baby mama! Then, John's tired of being Crystal's meal ticket and taking care of her family.
Video.title: Both Brothers Wanna Marry Me

Image.alt: Both Brothers Wanna Marry Me
Both Brothers Wanna Marry Me
Both Brothers Wanna Marry Me

Video.summary: Angelica is unapologetic about sleeping with her twin's boyfriend; Makayla confronts the woman with whom her children's father hooked up; Stormy wants to take a shower with her friend Jessica.
Video.title: Steamy Sister Sex

Image.alt: Steamy Sister Sex
Steamy Sister Sex
Steamy Sister Sex

Video.summary: Kiki wants to marry the man who cheated with her cousin; Tayshun blames his girlfriend for his infidelity; a porn star wants her crush to act out a scene with her.
Video.title: 50 Shades of Springer

Image.alt: 50 Shades of Springer
50 Shades of Springer
50 Shades of Springer

Video.summary: Another man may thwart Devin's pursuit of a relationship with a college student; Zhane learns who has been occupying her boyfriend's time; Emily and her brother learn that their significant others have gotten too close.
Video.title: Hot Headed Bromance

Image.alt: Hot Headed Bromance
Hot Headed Bromance
Hot Headed Bromance

Video.summary: Alex thinks he's here to reveal his secret lover, Naomi, to his girlfriend. But, Naomi has an even the bigger secret! Next Taneisha knows she has to now tell Roger the truth about herself...she's a transsexual prostitute!
Video.title: Clash Of The Transexuals!

Image.alt: Clash Of The Transexuals!
Clash Of The Transexuals!
Clash Of The Transexuals!

Video.summary: Denny weighs over 800 pounds and has been unable to leave his bed for the past 5 weeks and is ready to change.

Image.alt: Jerry Rescues An Obese Man
Jerry Rescues An Obese Man

Video.summary: A couple are here today to confess their infidelity…about the same woman! Next, Joan confronts a dominatrix.

Video.summary: Karla off with her cheating ex Tom and his new girl Ashley! Hollie regrets leaving Cortney for a man.

Video.summary: Is India’s boyfriend Q cheating with her ex? Jim’s own family members warned Autumn that he was unfaithful.

Video.summary: Nathan thinks his wife is cheating with his twin Steven. Sequoya suspects her boyfriend has a secret sex life.

Video.summary: Tina returns and is determined to prove her innocence. Will the lie detector test help reunite her family?

Video.summary: Did Sandy’s man cheat and give her an STD? Delisa wants Isiahdore to step up, but he claims he’s not the dad!
